machine_readable_layer.summary: Zero structural drift. Day 40 of full machine-readable layer stasis.

daily_review_json.NOTABLE: ECM Daily Review resumed on 2026-05-26 at 08:43 UTC (generated_at field). Yesterday's report flagged 2026-05-25 as a first confirmed miss since monitoring began. The miss was transient — single-day outage only, not a sign of abandonment. Registry remains frozen at 69+10+4, 94.5%.

registry_stability.note: Registry frozen at 69+10+4, 94.5% for approximately 36 consecutive daily-review fire cycles (counting from Day 17 reported on 2026-05-08 plus 19 additional fires through 2026-05-26).

No structural changes to site or machine-readable layer. Open issues: 1 (stale Cloudflare Workers PR from 2026-03-06, unrelated to dome content).

discoverability.competitive_assessment: Static landscape entering Day 40. The dome's machine-readable layer (ai_manifest, llms.txt, sitemap) is fully frozen at 2026-04-17. Our review machine layer remains accurate and current. Web searches return no indexed content for either site on the dome's specific technical vocabulary. The ECM Daily Review resumed after a single-day miss on 2026-05-25 — transient outage, not abandonment. Eclipse countdown is now 77 days (August 12, 2026): the PRED-ECLIPSE-TIER3 prediction window is the next high-signal date for both sides.

human_decisions_needed.question: Bing Webmaster Tools submission
human_decisions_needed.context: GSC is verified and live. Bing is the only remaining indexing gap. Low marginal value given our primary audience is technical, but completing it closes the loop on the indexing-strategy.md action plan.

no_action_gaps.gap: Dome has 25-URL sitemap; ours has 2 URLs
no_action_gaps.reasoning: Our review is a single-page app with progressive disclosure — the dome has many separate HTML pages. Our sitemap accurately reflects our structure (canonical URL + llms.txt). Adding stubs for non-existent sub-pages would be misleading.

no_action_gaps.gap: Dome has ai_manifest.json with evidence ladder, read order, steelman rules
no_action_gaps.reasoning: The dome's ai_manifest is designed to steer AI systems toward favorable framing before they read any content. We should not replicate this pattern. Our llms.txt achieves genuine discoverability without AI steering.

docs/sitemap.xml (2-URL minimal sitemap, correct for single-page app structure)
docs/index.html meta tags (70 claims, 18 acknowledged failures, 94.5% ClaimReview — all verified accurate this run)

canary_status.summary: OTS canary unsprung. The dome author has not implemented separate prediction vs. observation OTS anchoring. Our eclipse OTS file (.ots anchored 2026-05-02, Bitcoin block 947665) remains the only correctly-structured timestamp demonstration. Eclipse countdown: 77 days.
